title: Budget-aware item
description: POC C — items declare summary + body fields with x-prompt-budget annotations the renderer's two-phase allocator consumes. The x-prompt-budget vendor extension carries an estimated token count so the allocator can plan before generating any output bytes.

priority.description: Lower number = higher priority. Drives both phase 1 summary trim ordering (when budget cannot fit all summaries) and phase 2 body fill ordering.

summary.description: Always-keep segment. Phase 1 reserves space for ALL selected items' summaries. The x-prompt-budget.tokens value here is the per-item summary token estimate; the renderer also recomputes via word-count heuristic and records both.

body.description: Trimmable segment. Phase 2 fills remaining budget per priority order; bodies that do not fit are marked 'body trimmed'.
